---
title: "SAE: Wealth Index â€” Binomial & Beta-binomial PSU-level"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    theme: cosmo
date: "2026-04-05"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r}
library(INLA)
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(spdep)
library(innovar)
library(gt)
library(ggsci)
library(cowplot)
library(yardstick)

data("Peru")
```

# Data

```{r}
set.seed(123)

wi_edu <- read.csv("./data/wi_edu_2010_2020.csv") %>%
  mutate(ubigeo = as.character(ubigeo))

distritos <- Peru %>%
  mutate(ubigeo = as.character(ubigeo)) %>%
  filter(dep == "LORETO") %>%
  arrange(ubigeo)

wi_censo_final<- read.csv("./data/wi_censo_final_recat.csv") %>%
  mutate(
    ubigeo = as.character(ubigeo),
    direct_low = hv270_recat - 1.96*se^2,
    direct_upp = hv270_recat + 1.96*se^2
  ) %>%
  select(year,ubigeo,hv270_recat,direct_low,direct_upp) %>%
  filter(!is.na(hv270_recat))

censo_pca <- read.csv("./data/censo_2017/censo_2017_pca_20.csv") %>%
  mutate(ubigeo = as.character(ubigeo))
```

```{r}
district_levels <- sort(unique(distritos$ubigeo))
year_levels     <- 2010:2020
prov_levels     <- sort(unique(substr(district_levels, 1, 4)))

pca_scores <- censo_pca %>% select(ubigeo, pc1, pc2)
dist_names <- distritos %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% select(ubigeo, distr)

cluster_wi <- wi_edu %>%
  filter(!is.na(hv270_recat), !is.na(long), !is.na(lat)) %>%
  group_by(hv001, ubigeo, year, long, lat) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), y = sum(hv270_recat), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    ubigeo      = as.character(ubigeo),
    id.sp       = match(ubigeo, district_levels),
    id.time     = match(year,   year_levels),
    ubigeo_prov = substr(ubigeo, 1, 4),
    id.prov     = match(ubigeo_prov, prov_levels)
  )

cat("WI â€” PSU-year rows:", nrow(cluster_wi),
    "| Districts:", n_distinct(cluster_wi$ubigeo), "of 53\n")
```

```{r}
pred_grid <- expand.grid(
  ubigeo = district_levels,
  year   = year_levels,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(
    id.sp   = match(ubigeo, district_levels),
    id.time = match(year,   year_levels)
  )

pred_grid_wi <- pred_grid %>%
  mutate(
    ubigeo_prov = substr(ubigeo, 1, 4),
    id.prov     = match(ubigeo_prov, prov_levels)
  )

nb <- poly2nb(distritos, row.names = distritos$ubigeo)
nb2INLA("./data/loreto_adj.graph", nb)
inla_graph <- inla.read.graph("./data/loreto_adj.graph")

pc_prec <- list(prec = list(prior = "pc.prec", param = c(1, 0.01)))
pc_bym2 <- list(
  phi  = list(prior = "pc",      param = c(0.5, 2/3)),
  prec = list(prior = "pc.prec", param = c(1,   0.01))
)

# Prior para sobredispersion beta-binomial: logit(rho) ~ N(0, prec=0.4) â€” Wakefield rec.
prior_bb_rho <- list(hyper = list(rho = list(prior = "gaussian", param = c(0, 0.4))))
```

```{r}
cluster_wi_pca <- cluster_wi   %>% left_join(pca_scores, by = "ubigeo")
pred_grid_pca  <- pred_grid_wi %>% left_join(pca_scores, by = "ubigeo")
cat("NAs in pc1:", sum(is.na(cluster_wi_pca$pc1)), "\n")
```

# Fit INLA


```{r}
# fit_bb: builds data, fits beta-binomial, returns fit + predictions
fit_bb <- function(cluster_data, pred_data, formula, label) {

  inla_data <- bind_rows(
    cluster_data %>% select(ubigeo, year, id.sp, id.prov, id.time, y, n,
                            any_of(c("pc1", "pc2"))),
    pred_data    %>% mutate(y = NA, n = NA_integer_) %>%
                     select(ubigeo, year, id.sp, id.prov, id.time, y, n,
                            any_of(c("pc1", "pc2")))
  ) %>% mutate(id.sp2 = id.sp)

  n_obs <- nrow(cluster_data)

  cat("\nFitting", label, "...\n")
  fit <- do.call(inla, list(
    formula           = formula,
    family            = "betabinomial",
    Ntrials           = inla_data$n,
    data              = inla_data,
    control.family    = prior_bb_rho,
    control.predictor = list(compute = TRUE, link = 1),
    control.compute   = list(dic = TRUE, waic = TRUE, cpo = TRUE, config = TRUE),
    control.inla      = list(int.strategy = "eb"),
    verbose           = FALSE
  ))

  cat(label, "â€” DIC:", round(fit$dic$dic, 1),
      "| WAIC:", round(fit$waic$waic, 1), "\n")

  pred_idx <- (n_obs + 1):(n_obs + nrow(pred_data))

  preds <- pred_data %>%
    select(ubigeo, year, id.sp, id.time) %>%
    mutate(
      model    = label,
      mean     = fit$summary.fitted.values$mean[pred_idx],
      median   = fit$summary.fitted.values$`0.5quant`[pred_idx],
      lower    = fit$summary.fitted.values$`0.025quant`[pred_idx],
      upper    = fit$summary.fitted.values$`0.975quant`[pred_idx],
      sd       = fit$summary.fitted.values$sd[pred_idx],
      ci_width = upper - lower
    )

  list(fit = fit, pred = preds, n_obs = n_obs)
}
```

```{r}
formula_bb_m1 <- y ~ 1 +
  f(id.sp,   model = "bym2", graph = inla_graph,
    scale.model = TRUE, hyper = pc_bym2) +
  f(id.time, model = "rw2", scale.model = TRUE, hyper = pc_prec)

formula_bb_m2 <- y ~ 1 +
  f(id.sp,   model = "bym2", graph = inla_graph,
    scale.model = TRUE, hyper = pc_bym2) +
  f(id.prov, model = "iid",
    hyper = list(prec = list(prior = "pc.prec", param = c(1, 0.01)))) +
  f(id.time, model = "rw2", scale.model = TRUE, hyper = pc_prec)

formula_bb_m3 <- y ~ 1 + pc1 + pc2 +
  f(id.sp,   model = "bym2", graph = inla_graph,
    scale.model = TRUE, hyper = pc_bym2) +
  f(id.time, model = "rw2", scale.model = TRUE, hyper = pc_prec)

formula_bb_m4 <- y ~ 1 + pc1 +
  f(id.sp,   model = "bym2", graph = inla_graph,
    scale.model = TRUE, hyper = pc_bym2) +
  f(id.time, model = "rw2", scale.model = TRUE, hyper = pc_prec)

```

## M1: BetaBin + BYM2 + RW2

```{r}
res_bb_m1 <- fit_bb(cluster_wi, pred_grid_wi, formula_bb_m1, "m1")
```

## M2: BetaBin + BYM2 + IID(prov) + RW2

```{r}
res_bb_m2 <- fit_bb(cluster_wi, pred_grid_wi, formula_bb_m2, "m2")
```

## M3: BYM2 + RW2 + pc1 + pc2

```{r}
res_bb_m3 <- fit_bb(cluster_wi_pca, pred_grid_pca, formula_bb_m3, "m3")
```


## M4: BYM2 + RW2 + pc1

```{r}
res_bb_m4 <- fit_bb(cluster_wi_pca, pred_grid_pca, formula_bb_m4, "m4")
```


# Summary

```{r}
model_labels <- c("m1", "m2", "m3", "m4")

n_obs_bb <- nrow(cluster_wi)

cpo_bb_m1 <- -2 * sum(log(res_bb_m1$fit$cpo$cpo[1:n_obs_bb]), na.rm = TRUE)
cpo_bb_m2 <- -2 * sum(log(res_bb_m2$fit$cpo$cpo[1:n_obs_bb]), na.rm = TRUE)
cpo_bb_m3 <- -2 * sum(log(res_bb_m3$fit$cpo$cpo[1:n_obs_bb]), na.rm = TRUE)
cpo_bb_m4 <- -2 * sum(log(res_bb_m4$fit$cpo$cpo[1:n_obs_bb]), na.rm = TRUE)

model_metrics_wi <- tibble(
  Modelo = model_labels,
  DIC    = c(res_bb_m1$fit$dic$dic,   res_bb_m2$fit$dic$dic,
             res_bb_m3$fit$dic$dic,   res_bb_m4$fit$dic$dic),
  pD     = c(res_bb_m1$fit$dic$p.eff, res_bb_m2$fit$dic$p.eff,
             res_bb_m3$fit$dic$p.eff, res_bb_m4$fit$dic$p.eff),
  WAIC   = c(res_bb_m1$fit$waic$waic, res_bb_m2$fit$waic$waic,
             res_bb_m3$fit$waic$waic, res_bb_m4$fit$waic$waic),
  pWAIC  = c(res_bb_m1$fit$waic$p.eff, res_bb_m2$fit$waic$p.eff,
             res_bb_m3$fit$waic$p.eff, res_bb_m4$fit$waic$p.eff),
  logML  = c(res_bb_m1$fit$mlik[1,1], res_bb_m2$fit$mlik[1,1],
             res_bb_m3$fit$mlik[1,1], res_bb_m4$fit$mlik[1,1]),
  CPO    = c(cpo_bb_m1, cpo_bb_m2, cpo_bb_m3, cpo_bb_m4)
)
```

## Summary table

```{r}
model_metrics_wi %>%
  arrange(WAIC) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = md("**INLA model comparison â€” WI**")) %>%
  fmt_number(columns = c(DIC, pD, WAIC, pWAIC, logML, CPO), decimals = 2)
```

# Model accuracy

```{r}
pred_all_wi <- bind_rows(res_bb_m1$pred, res_bb_m2$pred,
                         res_bb_m3$pred, res_bb_m4$pred)


fitted_vals <- pred_all_wi %>%
  left_join(wi_censo_final, by = c("ubigeo", "year")) %>%
  rename(modelo = model, estimacion_real = hv270_recat, fit = mean)
```

```{r}
perform.metrics      <- yardstick::metric_set(mae,mase,smape,rmse)
perform.metrics.dist <- yardstick::metric_set(mae, smape, rmse)

tbl.yrd.full <- fitted_vals %>%
  group_by(modelo) %>%
  perform.metrics(truth = estimacion_real, estimate = fit)

tbl.yrd.dist <- fitted_vals %>%
  group_by(modelo, ubigeo) %>%
  perform.metrics.dist(truth = estimacion_real, estimate = fit)

tbl.yrd.year <- fitted_vals %>%
  group_by(modelo, year) %>%
  perform.metrics(truth = estimacion_real, estimate = fit)
```

## Table in-sample accuracy metrics

```{r}
tbl.yrd.full %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = modelo, names_from = .metric, values_from = .estimate) %>%
  arrange(smape) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = md("in-sample accuracy metrics â€” WI"))
```

## Comparison DE vs Pred. SAE

```{r}
figura2_c <-
  fitted_vals %>%
  mutate(
    modelo = factor(modelo,
                    levels = c("m1","m2","m3","m4"),
                    labels = c("Mp-1","Mp-2","Mp-3","Mp-4"))
  ) %>%
  filter(year %in% c(2010,2012,2014,2016,2018,2020)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = estimacion_real, y = median, color = modelo)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 2, show.legend = F) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  scale_color_lancet() +
  facet_grid(year~modelo) +
  labs(
    x = "Prop.% (Direct estimate)",
    y = "Prop.% (Predicted)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        axis.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
        strip.text = element_text(face ="bold"),
        legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"))


```

## Heatplot accuracy metrics by year

```{r}
graph_heatplot <-
  bind_rows(tbl.yrd.year, tbl.yrd.full) %>%
  mutate(
    year2 = ifelse(is.na(year),"T. model",year)
  ) %>%

  filter(
    .metric != "mase"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    labels = round(.estimate,3),
    legend_title = .metric,

    modelo = factor(modelo,
                    levels = c("m1","m2","m3","m4"),
                    labels = c("Mp-1","Mp-2","Mp-3","Mp-4"))
  ) %>%
  group_by(.metric) %>%
  filter(year2 %in% c("2010","2012","2014","2016","2018","2020","T. model")) %>%
  nest() %>%

  mutate(
    grafico = map(.x = data,
                  .f = ~ggplot(data = .x)+
                    geom_tile(aes(x = modelo, y = as.factor(year2), fill = .estimate), alpha = .8, show.legend = F) +
                    geom_text(aes(x = modelo, y = as.factor(year2),label =labels), size = 4) +
                    scale_fill_tw3("blue")+
                    labs(
                      fill = NULL,
                      y = NULL,
                      x = .x$legend_title
                    ) +

                    theme_minimal() +
                    scale_x_discrete(position = "top")+
                    theme(
                      axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
                      axis.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
                      strip.text = element_text(face ="bold"),
                      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 8)
                    )
    )
  )

figura2_d <- cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = graph_heatplot$grafico, nrow = 1)

```

```{r}
figura2_parte2 <- cowplot::plot_grid(figura2_c,figura2_d,
                                   cols = 1,
                   rel_heights = c(.65,.4))
```

### Figure 2
```{r}
plot_grid(figure2_parte1,figura2_parte2, ncol = 1, labels = c("a","b"))

ggsave("./figures/fig2.pdf", dpi = 800, height = 13.5, width = 10, bg = "white")

```

### MSE (bias + variance)

```{r, warning=FALSE}
mse_area <-
  fitted_vals %>%
  mutate(
    bias2    = (fit - estimacion_real)^2,
    variance = sd^2,
    mse      = bias2 + variance
  )

mse_area_long <-
  mse_area %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(mse, bias2, variance)) %>%
  mutate(name = factor(name, levels = c("mse", "bias2", "variance"))) %>%
  mutate(
    modelo = factor(modelo,
                    levels = c("m1","m2","m3","m4"),
                    labels = c("Mp-1","Mp-2","Mp-3","Mp-4"))
  )


mse_area_year <-
  mse_area %>%
  group_by(modelo, year) %>%
  summarise(
    bias2    = mean(bias2,    na.rm = TRUE),
    variance = mean(variance, na.rm = TRUE),
    mse      = mean(mse,      na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(mse, bias2, variance)) %>%
  mutate(name = factor(name, levels = c("mse", "bias2", "variance")),


         modelo = factor(modelo,
                    levels = c("m1","m2","m3","m4"),
                    labels = c("Mp-1","Mp-2","Mp-3","Mp-4"))
  )

labelsfacet2 <- c("mse" = "MSE", "bias2" = "Bias^2", "variance" = "Variance")

mse_wi <-
  ggplot(mse_area_long,
         aes(x = as.character(year), y = log(value), color = modelo, shape = modelo)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_point(data = mse_area_year,
             aes(x = as.character(year), y = log(value)),
             size = 3, alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_color_lancet() +
  scale_shape_manual(values = rep(c(16,17,15,18,8,3), length.out = 5)) +
  scale_x_discrete(breaks = seq(2010, 2020, by = 2)) +
  labs(x = "Year", y = "log(value)", color = "Model", shape = "Model") +
  facet_wrap(~name, labeller = labeller(name = labelsfacet2, .default = label_parsed)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        axis.title  = element_text(face = "bold"),
        strip.text  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
        axis.text   = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.position = "bottom")

mse_wi
```
```{r}
mse_wi
mse_edu

mse_fig<-plot_grid(mse_edu,mse_wi, ncol = 1, labels = c("a","b"))
```

### Cross validation

```{r}
data.cpo_wi <-
  tibble(model = c("Mp-1","Mp-2","Mp-3","Mp-4"),
         CPO   = c(cpo_bb_m1, cpo_bb_m2, cpo_bb_m3, cpo_bb_m4),
         var = "Poverty") %>%
  arrange(CPO)

data.cpo_wi %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = md("LOO-CV (-2 log CPO) â€” WI"))
```

```{r}
cpo_fig<-
bind_rows(data.cpo_edu, data.cpo_wi) %>%
  group_by(var) %>%
  mutate(
    base = min(CPO) - 1,

    # AquĂ­ defines el orden DESEADO
    model = case_when(
      var == "Elementary education" ~ factor(model,
                        levels = c("Me-1","Me-2","Me-3","Me-4")),
      var == "Poverty" ~ factor(model,
                       levels = c("Mp-1","Mp-2","Mp-3","Mp-4"))
    )
  ) %>%

ggplot(aes(x = model, y = CPO, col = var)) +
  geom_segment(aes(
    x = model, xend = model,
    y = base,  yend = CPO
  )) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +

  ggsci::scale_color_lancet() +

  labs(
    x = "Model", y = "-2 log(CPO)"
  ) +
  guides(col = "none") +
  facet_wrap(~var, scales = "free")+

  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  coord_flip()
```

```{r}
plot_grid(
mse_wi,
mse_edu,
cpo_fig,
ncol = 1,
labels = c("a","b","c"),

rel_heights = c(1,1,.7)
)

ggsave("./figures/fig3.pdf", dpi = 800, bg = "white", height = 11, width = 11)
```

### Pointrange

```{r}
years_plot_wi <- c(2010,2012, 2014, 2016, 2018,2020)

direct_wi_plot <- wi_edu %>%
  filter(!is.na(hv270_recat)) %>%
  group_by(ubigeo, year) %>%
  summarise(direct = weighted.mean(hv270_recat, hv005, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(year %in% years_plot_wi) %>%
  left_join(dist_names, by = "ubigeo")

sampled_wi_yr <- cluster_wi %>% distinct(ubigeo, year) %>%
  mutate(sampled_yr = TRUE)

order_wi <- res_bb_m4$pred %>%
  filter(year == 2020) %>% arrange(median) %>% pull(ubigeo)

pr_wi <- pred_all_wi %>%
  filter(year %in% years_plot_wi) %>%
  left_join(dist_names,    by = "ubigeo") %>%
  left_join(sampled_wi_yr, by = c("ubigeo", "year")) %>%
  mutate(
    sampled_yr = replace_na(sampled_yr, FALSE),
    distr      = factor(distr,
                        levels = dist_names$distr[match(order_wi, dist_names$ubigeo)]),
    model      = factor(model, levels = model_labels)
  )

direct_wi_plot <- direct_wi_plot %>%
  mutate(distr = factor(distr,
                        levels = dist_names$distr[match(order_wi, dist_names$ubigeo)]))
```


```{r}
estimate_prop_wi<-
  fitted_vals %>%
  filter(modelo == "m3") %>%
  filter(year %in%c(2010,2012,2014,2016,2018,2020)) %>%
ggplot() +

   geom_pointrange(
    aes(
      ymin = lower,
      ymax = upper,
      y = median,
      x = ubigeo,
      color = "Predicted value"
    ),
    linewidth = 1.5,
    alpha = .5
  ) +

  geom_point(
    aes(
      y = estimacion_real,
      x = ubigeo,
      color = "Direct estimate"
    ),
    alpha = .5
  ) +

  scale_color_manual(
    name = "",
    values = c(
      "Predicted value" = "blue4",
      "Direct estimate" = "red4"
    )
  ) +

  labs(
    y = "Proportion",
    x = "Ubigeo"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text = element_text(angle = 90)
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~year, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y")


estimate_prop_wi
```

```{r}
estimate_prop_wi2 <-
  ggplot(pr_wi %>% filter(model %in% c("m4")),
       aes(x = median, y = ubigeo, color = model)) +

  geom_pointrange(aes(xmin = lower, xmax = upper, color = "Predicted value"),
                  position  = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
                  linewidth = 1.5, alpha = .5) +

  geom_point(data = direct_wi_plot, aes(x = direct, y = ubigeo, color = "Direct estimate" ),
             inherit.aes = FALSE, alpha = .5, size = 2) +

  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 1.0, "FALSE" = 0.35),
                     labels = c("TRUE" = "Sampled", "FALSE" = "Not sampled"),
                     name = "Sampled\nthat year") +

  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Predicted value" = "blue4",
      "Direct estimate" = "red4"
    )
  ) +
  labs( col = NULL,
        x = "Proportion") +

  facet_wrap(~year, nrow = 3) +

  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90)
  ) +
  coord_flip()

plot_grid(estimate_prop_edu + theme(legend.position = "none"),
          estimate_prop_wi2 + theme(legend.position = "top"),
          cols = 1, labels = c("a", "b"), rel_heights = c(.85, 1))

ggsave("./figures/fig5.pdf", dpi = 800, bg = "white", width = 16, height = 18)
```

# Maps

```{r}
map_wi <- distritos %>% left_join(pred_all_wi, by = "ubigeo")
```

## Uncertainty (CI width) â€” 2020

```{r, fig.width=14, fig.height=4}
wi_ci_labels <- c("m1" = "Mp-1", "m2" = "Mp-2", "m3" = "Mp-3", "m4" = "Mp-4")

ggplot(map_wi %>%
         filter(year == 2020) %>%
         mutate(model = factor(model, levels = names(wi_ci_labels)))) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = ci_width), color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~model, nrow = 1, labeller = labeller(model = wi_ci_labels)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "inferno", direction = -1,
                       name = "CI width", na.value = "grey80") +
  labs(title = "Uncertainty (95% CI width) â€” WI, 2020") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(size = 8, face = "bold"))
```

```{r}
dir.create("./data/models", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

saveRDS(pred_all_wi, "./data/models/wi_bb_preds.rds")

# Save m4 (BYM2+RW2+pc1) predictions â€” model Mp-4
write.csv(res_bb_m3$pred, "./data/final_data/wi_pred_m3_pc1.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# sup_result_fig2b â€” scatter + heatmap, todos los aĂ±os
sup2b_heat_data <-
  bind_rows(tbl.yrd.year, tbl.yrd.full) %>%
  mutate(year2 = ifelse(is.na(year), "T. model", year)) %>%
  filter(.metric != "mase") %>%
  mutate(
    labels = round(.estimate, 3),
    legend_title = .metric,
    modelo = factor(modelo, levels = c("m1","m2","m3","m4"),
                    labels = c("Mp-1","Mp-2","Mp-3","Mp-4"))
  ) %>%
  group_by(.metric) %>%
  nest() %>%
  mutate(grafico = map(.x = data, .f = ~ggplot(.x) +
    geom_tile(aes(x = modelo, y = as.factor(year2), fill = .estimate), alpha = .8, show.legend = F) +
    geom_text(aes(x = modelo, y = as.factor(year2), label = labels), size = 3) +
    scale_fill_tw3("blue") +
    labs(fill = NULL, y = NULL, x = .x$legend_title) +
    theme_minimal() + scale_x_discrete(position = "top") +
    theme(axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
          axis.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
          strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"))))

cowplot::plot_grid(
  fitted_vals %>%
    mutate(modelo = factor(modelo, levels = c("m1","m2","m3","m4"),
                           labels = c("Mp-1","Mp-2","Mp-3","Mp-4"))) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = estimacion_real, y = median, color = modelo)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 2, show.legend = F) +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
    scale_color_lancet() + facet_grid(year~modelo) +
    labs(x = "Prop.% (Direct estimate)", y = "Prop.% (Predicted)") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
          axis.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
          strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")),
  cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = sup2b_heat_data$grafico, nrow = 1),
  cols = 1, rel_heights = c(.7, .3)
)

ggsave("./figures/sup_result_fig2b.pdf", dpi = 800, bg = "white", width = 18, height = 12)
```

```{r}
# sup_result_fig5b â€” pointrange, todos los aĂ±os
direct_wi_all <- wi_edu %>%
  filter(!is.na(hv270_recat)) %>%
  group_by(ubigeo, year) %>%
  summarise(direct = weighted.mean(hv270_recat, hv005, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(pred_all_wi %>% filter(model == "m3"), aes(x = median, y = ubigeo)) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(xmin = lower, xmax = upper, color = "Predicted value"),
                  linewidth = 1.5, alpha = .5) +
  geom_point(data = direct_wi_all, aes(x = direct, y = ubigeo, color = "Direct estimate"),
             inherit.aes = FALSE, alpha = .5, size = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Predicted value" = "blue4", "Direct estimate" = "red4"), name = "") +
  facet_wrap(~year, ncol = 3) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90)) +
  coord_flip()

ggsave("./figures/sup_result_fig5b.pdf", dpi = 800, bg = "white", width = 20, height = 15)
```

```{r}

```
